title: Variables and Data Types Lab
description: Write a Java program that demonstrates the use of int double boolean and String variables. Include type casting examples.

title: String Methods Practice
description: Complete the StringExercises.java file implementing 5 string manipulation methods using charAt substring and indexOf.

title: Scanner Input Quiz
description: What method of the Scanner class is used to read an integer from the user?

title: If-Else Decision Making
description: Write a GradeCalculator program that takes a numeric score and outputs the letter grade using if-else chains.

title: While Loop Patterns
description: Create programs that use while loops to generate number patterns: pyramid triangle and diamond shapes in the console.

title: For Loop Array Traversal
description: Implement methods that use for loops to find min max sum and average of integer arrays.

title: Class Design: BankAccount
description: Design and implement a BankAccount class with instance variables constructor deposit withdraw and getBalance methods.

title: ArrayList Operations
description: Implement a StudentRoster program using ArrayList with add remove search and sort operations.

title: AP Practice: FRQ Set 1
description: Complete Free Response Questions 1-3 from the 2023 AP CS A exam practice set. Show all work.

title: Personal Portfolio Page
description: Create a personal portfolio webpage using semantic HTML5 elements. Must include header nav main and footer sections.

title: CSS Selectors Challenge
description: Style the provided HTML document using only CSS selectors. Demonstrate class id descendant and pseudo-class selectors.

title: Flexbox Layout Project
description: Build a responsive card layout using CSS Flexbox. Cards should wrap and maintain consistent spacing on all screen sizes.

title: JavaScript Calculator
description: Build a functional calculator using HTML CSS and JavaScript. Must handle addition subtraction multiplication and division.

title: DOM Todo List App
description: Create an interactive todo list application using DOM manipulation. Features: add delete and mark complete.

title: Weather API Project
description: Build a weather dashboard that fetches data from a public API and displays current conditions and forecast.

title: Final Portfolio Revision
description: Revise and expand your personal portfolio with JavaScript interactivity and responsive design. Deploy to GitHub Pages.

title: Number Systems Worksheet
description: Convert between binary decimal and hexadecimal. Complete all 20 conversion problems showing your work.

title: Internet Protocols Quiz
description: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP. Give one example use case for each.

title: Algorithm Flowcharts
description: Design flowcharts for three algorithms: linear search binary search and bubble sort. Use proper flowchart symbols.

title: Data Privacy Research Paper
description: Write a 2-page research paper on data privacy concerns with social media platforms. Cite at least 3 sources.

title: Innovation Impact Presentation
description: Create a 5-minute presentation on a computing innovation and its societal impact. Include benefits and risks.

title: Day 3 Kelp Macro Shots - Upload
description: Upload all macro lens photographs from Day 3 (May 14) kelp transects. Include RAW + JPEG. Label by transect letter.
